stemHtml: A pilot is planning a leg between point A (43°S 169°W) and point B (43°S 171°W). Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: Only one great circle can be drawn, with its radius equal to the earth radius.
options.b: Only one rhumb line can be drawn, with its radius smaller than the earth radius.
options.c: An infinite number of great circles can be drawn with their radius smaller than the earth radius.
options.d: An infinite number of small circles can be drawn, with their radius equal to the earth radius.
